issues.title: No trend data for individual crime types
issues.description: The Crime Types page shows current counts and arrest rates, but there is no way to see how a specific crime type has trended over time. A journalist needs this for trend stories.
reproduction_steps: Look for trend chart per type
issues.expected: Click a crime type to see its timeseries trend
issues.actual: Only aggregate bar charts; no per-type trend

issues.title: No comparison between crime types
issues.description: A journalist wants to compare 'THEFT' vs 'BURGLARY' trends side by side. The current view only shows separate bars.
issues.expected: Multi-select to overlay trend lines for selected types

summary: Crime Types page shows current data but lacks trend analysis and comparison capability needed for stories.
